parse.description: Empty expression returns empty token list without exception
parse.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration with default settings; no mocks

parse.description: Single number literal produces one NUMBER_LITERAL token
parse.path: B0竊達1竊達2竊達3竊達6竊達1竊達7竊達11
parse.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration with default settings; no mocks
parse.expectedResult: returned list contains one token with type NUMBER_LITERAL and value "42"

parse.description: Implicit multiplication inserted when NUMBER followed by BRACE_OPEN and allowed
parse.path: B0竊達1竊達2竊達3竊達4竊達6竊達1竊達2竊達6竊達1竊達7竊達11
parse.expectedResult: returned tokens sequence: NUMBER_LITERAL("2"), INFIX_OPERATOR("*"), BRACE_OPEN, NUMBER_LITERAL("3"), BRACE_CLOSE

parse.description: Missing operator exception when NUMBER before BRACE_OPEN and implicit multiplication disallowed
pseudocode: TEST TC04 missing operator implicit disabled

parse.description: Unexpected token after INFIX_OPERATOR triggers validateToken exception
parse.path: B0竊達1竊達2竊達6竊達1竊達2竊達6竊達1竊達7竊達11
parse.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration default; inject input "+*" to cause INFIX then INFIX
parse.expectedResult: throws ParseException with message "Unexpected token after infix operator"
pseudocode: TEST TC05 invalid token after infix
throws ParseException with message "Unexpected token after infix operator"

parse.description: Misplaced structure separator at start triggers exception
parse.path: B0竊達1竊達2竊達6竊達1竊達2竊達6竊達1竊達7竊達11
parse.precondition: ExpressionConfiguration with structuresAllowed=true; input starts with ".a"
parse.expectedResult: throws ParseException with message "Misplaced structure operator"
pseudocode: throws ParseException with message "Misplaced structure operator"

parse.description: Unmatched closing brace at end triggers closing brace exception
parse.expectedResult: throws ParseException with message "Closing brace not found"
pseudocode: throws ParseException with message "Closing brace not found"

parse.description: Array open and close produce ARRAY_OPEN and ARRAY_CLOSE tokens
parse.path: B0竊達1竊達2竊達6竊達1竊達2竊達6竊達1竊達7竊達11
parse.expectedResult: returned list contains ARRAY_OPEN, NUMBER_LITERAL("1"), ARRAY_CLOSE

parse.description: Undefined operator sequence triggers undefined operator exception
parse.path: B0竊達1竊達2竊達6竊達1竊達2竊達6竊達1竊達7竊達11
parse.expectedResult: returned list contains STRING_LITERAL with value "a'b"
pseudocode: TEST TC10 parse string literal with escape
